faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about SexyVoice.ai

questions.question: Which languages are supported for Speech Generation?
questions.answer:
Language support depends on the selected voice.

Some of our AI voices (Puck, Zephyr, Gacrux, Kore, Sulafat, etc.) support 24 languages including:
🇪🇬 Arabic (Egyptian),
🇧🇩 Bengali (Bangladesh),
🇳🇱 Dutch (Netherlands),
🇺🇸 English (US),
🇮🇳 English/Hindi (India),
🇫🇷 French (France),
🇩🇪 German (Germany),
🇮🇳 Hindi (India),
🇮🇩 Indonesian (Indonesia),
🇮🇹 Italian (Italy),
🇯🇵 Japanese (Japan),
🇰🇷 Korean (Korea),
🇮🇳 Marathi (India),
🇵🇱 Polish (Poland),
🇧🇷 Portuguese (Brazil),
🇷🇴 Romanian (Romania),
🇷🇺 Russian (Russia),
🇺🇸 Spanish (US),
🇮🇳 Tamil (India),
🇮🇳 Telugu (India),
🇹🇭 Thai (Thailand),
🇹🇷 Turkish (Turkey),
🇺🇦 Ukrainian (Ukraine),
and 🇻🇳 Vietnamese (Vietnam).

Other voices are language-specific:
🇬🇧 Dan (English UK),
🇮🇹 Pietro (Italian),
🇺🇸 Emma (English US),
🇪🇸 Javi (Spanish),
🇺🇸 Josh (English US),
🇺🇸 and Tara (English US).

Choose your voice based on your target language for the most natural results.

questions.question: Can I make a voice speak with a specific accent or style, like British or pirate🏴‍☠️?
questions.answer: Yes! Choose a multilingual voice (e.g., Zephyr) and type the style you want—“British accent,” “pirate voice,” “seductive tone,” etc. The model instantly adapts, and you can refine it with more instructions.

questions.question: How does voice cloning work?
questions.answer: Our AI analyzes your voice sample (min 10 seconds) to learn its unique patterns and characteristics. With just a few seconds of clean audio, you can build a digital version of your voice that sounds natural and realistic.

questions.question: Can I clone my own voice?
questions.answer: Yes! With just a few seconds of clean audio, it can build a digital version of your voice that sounds natural and realistic.

questions.question: How is voice cloning priced?
questions.answer: Voice cloning is priced based on the amount of speech you generate, so longer scripts use more credits. It costs more than regular voice generation because cloned voices rely on a more expensive model to reproduce a specific voice accurately.

questions.question: Which languages are supported for Voice Cloning?
questions.answer:
Voice cloning supports the following 23 languages:

🇸🇦 Arabic,
🇩🇰 Danish,
🇳🇱 Dutch,
🇬🇧 English,
🇫🇮 Finnish,
🇫🇷 French,
🇩🇪 German,
🇬🇷 Greek,
🇮🇱 Hebrew,
🇮🇳 Hindi,
🇮🇹 Italian,
🇯🇵 Japanese,
🇰🇷 Korean,
🇲🇾 Malay,
🇨🇳 Mandarin Chinese,
🇳🇴 Norwegian,
🇵🇱 Polish,
🇵🇹 Portuguese,
🇷🇺 Russian,
🇪🇸 Spanish,
🇰🇪 Swahili,
🇸🇪 Swedish,
and 🇹🇷 Turkish.

questions.question: How does Live AI Calling work?
questions.answer: Tap the call button and you'll be connected instantly to a private AI voice call. You can talk naturally, interrupt, change topics, or listen — your call flows like a real conversation.

questions.question: How much does it cost?
questions.answer: Live calling costs 2000 credits per minute while you're connected.

questions.question: Is my voice data secure?
questions.answer: Absolutely. All voice recordings and generated files are encrypted and stored safely. When you clone a voice, we delete the uploaded voice sample and no one else can use it. You have full control over the generated audio files, and can delete them whenever you want. We never share voice data without your consent.

questions.question: What can I use the generated voices for?
questions.answer: Creators use our voices for videos, podcasts, audiobooks, social content, games, e-learning, and more. It’s an easy way to keep consistent audio quality. Just remember our terms prohibit deception or impersonation.

questions.question: How many credits do I need?
questions.answer: About 1,000 credits make 1 minute of audio generation. New users get 10,000 free credits (about 5 minutes of speech). Our Starter plan includes 25,000 monthly credits, while Pro offers 300,000 credits for bigger projects. Choose what works for your needs.

questions.question: Why choose SexyVoice.ai?
questions.answer: We combine premium voice quality with simple tools and fair pricing. Whether you’re a creator or a business, you get professional results without contracts or complicated setups. The free credits make it easy to try everything out.

questions.question: Do you have an API for developers?
questions.answer: Yes! Our API lets developers add voice generation to apps, websites, and games. You'll be able to create speech on demand and programmatically. See the {link}.

items.question: Is this audio transcription tool really free?
items.answer: Yes. No account, no credit card, no usage limits — ever. We built it as a free public utility.

items.question: Does my audio get uploaded to a server?
items.answer: No. The transcription runs entirely in your browser using WebAssembly. Your audio never leaves your device.

items.question: What languages does it support?
items.answer: The multilingual Whisper models support 32 languages: Arabic, Bengali, Chinese, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Malay, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Spanish, Swedish, Tamil, Telugu, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, and Vietnamese.

items.question: What audio formats are supported?
items.answer: MP3, WAV, M4A, OGG (WhatsApp), FLAC, and WebM — anything your browser can decode. Video files work too.

items.question: How accurate is the transcription?
items.answer: The tool uses OpenAI Whisper, one of the most accurate open-source speech recognition models. Choose Whisper Small (~250 MB) for the best accuracy, or Whisper Tiny (~40 MB) for speed.

items.question: Does it work without an internet connection?
items.answer: After the model downloads once, yes. The model is cached in your browser, so future transcriptions work fully offline.
